description: Shell completions (bash/zsh) + runtime detection + Bun adapter

tasks.title: Completion generator types and shell enum
tasks.description: Define Shell type ('bash' | 'zsh' | 'fish' | 'powershell'), CompletionOptions, and generator function signatures in src/core/completion/index.ts. Export from main barrel. No implementation yet — just the type contracts and stubs that throw 'not implemented'.

tasks.title: Runtime detection function
tasks.description: Implement detectRuntime(): 'node' | 'bun' | 'deno' | 'unknown' in src/runtime/detect.ts using globalThis checks (Bun.version, Deno.version). Export from barrel. Unit tests with mocked globalThis.

tasks.title: Bash completion script generator
tasks.description: Implement generateBashCompletion(cliSchema): string. Pure string generation — output a complete bash script with _<name>_completions function, compgen for flags/subcommands, COMPREPLY assignment. Tests assert on expected script structure (function name, flag names, subcommand names present). No shelling out.

tasks.title: Zsh completion script generator
tasks.description: Implement generateZshCompletion(cliSchema): string. Pure string generation — output a complete zsh script with #compdef directive, _arguments calls for flags with descriptions, _describe for subcommands. Tests assert on script structure. No shelling out.

tasks.title: Bun adapter implementation
tasks.description: Implement createBunAdapter() in src/runtime/bun.ts. Bun provides Node-compatible process global, so this delegates to createNodeAdapter() with Bun-specific overrides if needed. Add to barrel exports. Tests verify adapter satisfies RuntimeAdapter interface.

tasks.title: Unified generateCompletion(schema, shell) dispatcher
tasks.description: Public generateCompletion(schema, shell: Shell): string function that dispatches to bash/zsh generators. Throws CLIError for unsupported shells (fish/powershell for now). Re-export from main barrel and public surface.

tasks.title: Auto-adapter factory using runtime detection
tasks.description: Implement createAdapter(): RuntimeAdapter that uses detectRuntime() to pick the right adapter (node/bun). Falls back to Node for unknown. Add to barrel exports. Wire as default in CLIBuilder.run() replacing hardcoded createNodeAdapter().

tasks.title: Built-in completions subcommand for CLIBuilder
tasks.description: Add .completions() method to CLIBuilder that registers a 'completions' subcommand with --shell flag (enum: bash/zsh). Action generates script via generateCompletion() and writes to stdout via out.log(). The method needs access to the CLI schema to pass to the generator.

tasks.title: End-to-end completion + runtime tests
tasks.description: Integration tests: CLIBuilder with .completions(), execute ['completions', '--shell', 'bash'], verify stdout contains valid script. Test auto-adapter wiring. Test detectRuntime in CLIBuilder.run() path. Verify completion scripts include all registered commands and their flags.
